title: Asset
description: Represents a set of standardized attributes needed for identification and attribution.

system_id.description: A valid CSNR IT Service Management code which identifies the source system, service or asset that the data originates from.

record_id.description: The record or primary key representing what the data this message is directly associated to.

record_kind.description: The kind of record the source system stores this record as (for example, Anchor or Permit).
